description: Install dependencies and verify existing codebase imports correctly. Add new dependencies (requests, lxml, beautifulsoup4) to requirements.txt for online data and report features.
steps: Update requirements.txt to add: requests>=2.31.0, lxml>=4.9.0, beautifulsoup4>=4.12.0
Run pip install -r requirements.txt to install all dependencies
Verify all existing modules import without error: python -c "import utils.data_generator; import utils.visualizations; import utils.ai_insights; print('All imports OK')"
Verify streamlit is importable: python -c "import streamlit; print(streamlit.__version__)"
acceptance_criteria: requirements.txt contains requests, lxml, and beautifulsoup4
pip install -r requirements.txt completes without errors
All existing module imports succeed without errors
verification: python -c "import utils.data_generator; import utils.visualizations; import utils.ai_insights; import requests; import lxml; import bs4; print('All OK')"
